title: Emissive Glowing Ores
description: Makes ores glow to enhance visibility. (OptiFine/Continuity required)
body:
![Glowing ores in minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f7b81a5b5eaa1794eddc3c939888d052639dd8.webp)

**Emissive Glowing Ores** adds glowing textures to the overworld and nether ores. [OptiFine](https://optifine.net) (Forge), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Fabric, Forge, NeoForge or Quilt) or any other mod that supports emissive textures is required, else nothing will be changed.



Makes the following blocks emissive:
- Iron Ore
- Coal Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Lapis Lazuli Ore
- Gold Ore
- Copper Ore
- Ancient Debris
- Gilded Blackstone
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Nether Gold Ore
